rulings.Case Title: TRUST CREATED UNDER THE WILL OF ABRAHAM L. GUMP
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Accepting Resignation Of Trustee And Appointing Successor Trustee
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/1/19 - Exhibit B to Petition (Order establishing trust) does not have all pages and much of it is illegible. Please file a complete, legible copy. The Petition will be reviewed once the order has been filed. As a preliminary matter, Examiner noticed that notice to several people was sent c/o someone else. Please note that all interested parties must receive direct notice unless directed otherwise in writing. If they are a minor, notice must also be given to the adult who has custody. If they are a conservatee, notice must also be given to the conservator.
